entries.notes: Fallback direct pricing outside specific seasonal entries. 2026 seasonal direct rates are captured in narrower override records: standard $1,600/night, summer peak $1,750/night, holiday peak $1,800/night.
2026 standard direct rate. Rounded sales-friendly pricing targeting roughly a 20–25% book-direct discount versus sampled OTA totals.
2026 summer/late-summer peak direct rate. Based on sampled OTA peak totals around $15,740/week; $1,750/night gives a $12,250 7-night direct total, about 22% below OTA.
2026 holiday peak direct rate for Christmas/New Year demand. $1,800/night gives a $12,600 7-night direct total, preserving roughly a 20% book-direct advantage against strongest observed OTA pricing.

VRBO fees rolled into nightly rate per owner direction on 2026-04-25. Exact checkout screenshot: $1,792.10/night all-in, tax 10.38% on base. Total for May 16-23 (7 nights): $13,847 (vs direct $10,500 — saving $3,347).
